name: Kou Sakuragi
description: The way she gets absorbed in games bears an uncanny resemblance to a certain someone. Doesn't use any social media sites or apps. Her messages tend to be very long, as if she carefully collected all her thoughts before writing them down. As a result, it takes her a while to send a response since she ends up revising them over and over. “Sorry” and “apologize” always come up first as suggestions when she starts typing. The anxiety she feels from having to send messages or make phone calls is akin to having a heart attack.
